_note: Server-only answer key. This template has no HITL Confirm/Revise gates — every item is graded objectively by code.scoring against these canonical answers. Kept for reference and audit only.

ranking.rationale: Each converted free user adds $18 of contribution toward the $8,000 to cover; reducing fixed cost and raising price help less; adding more free users only adds variable cost, so it is the worst lever.
